basic_details.job_title: DRDO CABS Civilian Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Centre for Airborne Systems Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO CABS)
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Airborne Systems Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO CABS) Civilian Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 16 June 2026 on the official website of DRDO CABS. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DRDO CABS Civilian Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS registered with KMC/IMC, PG Diploma/Degree in Aviation Medicine (desirable)
qualification.details: Civilian Medical Officer: MBBS registered with KMC/IMC, desirable PG Diploma/Degree in Aviation Medicine, minimum 5 years experience as RMP.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DRDO CABS Civilian Medical Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DRDO CABS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DRDO CABS Civilian Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DRDO CABS Civilian Medical Officer Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DRDO CABS Civilian Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO CABS Civilian Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Civilian Medical Officer post is 15th July 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications reach the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Civilian Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree registered with KMC/IMC. A PG Diploma/Degree in Aviation Medicine is desirable. Additionally, a minimum of 5 years of experience as a Registered Medical Practitioner (RMP) is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Civilian Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Civilian Medical Officer post is 65 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Civilian Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Civilian Medical Officer position will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 60,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Civilian Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Civilian Medical Officer post at DRDO CABS.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Civilian Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial scrutiny of applications, followed by document verification. Candidates who clear these stages will be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the DRDO CABS Civilian Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the DRDO CABS located?
faq.answer: DRDO CABS is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with the pincode 560037.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contract-based job at DRDO CABS.
